# Omnidevx

> Elite software engineering agency specializing in AI-powered MVPs, web & mobile applications, and scalable cloud infrastructure.

## About

Omnidevx is a global engineering collective that builds production-grade software for startups and enterprises. We specialize in AI/ML integrations, full-stack web development, cross-platform mobile apps, and DevOps automation.

## Services

- **AI-Powered MVP**: Rapid prototyping and deployment of AI-first minimum viable products. From concept to production in weeks, not months.
- **Generative AI Solutions**: Embedding generative AI natively into business workflows — RAG pipelines, fine-tuned LLMs, and intelligent automation.
- **Web Engineering**: Scalable, performant web applications built with modern frameworks (React, Next.js, Astro) and cloud-native architecture.
- **Mobile Development**: Cross-platform mobile apps (React Native, Flutter) with native performance and premium UX.
- **DevOps & SQA**: CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure-as-code, automated testing, and 24/7 monitoring with Datadog and Sentry.

## Process

1. **Discovery & Strategy** — Deep-dive into business goals, audience, and technical constraints
2. **Design & Architecture** — UX/UI design, database schemas, and API infrastructure planning
3. **Agile Development** — Iterative sprints with CI/CD, transparent progress, and rapid feedback
4. **Launch & Scale** — Deployment, performance monitoring, and ongoing support

## Contact

- Website: https://omnidevx.com
- Email: hello@omnidevx.com
- Location: San Francisco, CA
